tu.prop: Whole-poem fallback because Chinese and English stanza structures do not align safely.

tuv.seg: 維鵲有巢，維鳩居之，之子于歸，百兩御之。 維鵲有巢，維鳩方之，之子于歸，百兩將之。 維鵲有巢，維鳩盈之，之子于歸，百兩成之。

Magpie has made its nest, And the dove occupies it. This young lady is going to her future home, With a hundred chariots to escort her.
Magpie has made its nest, And the dove fills it. This young lady is going to her future home, With a hundred chariots all complete.
Magpie has made its nest, And the dove is in it. This young lady is going to her future home, With a hundred chariots as attendants.
